description:
✴Free KodeKloud Hands-on Labs & Courses (Exclusive)
- Hands-on Labs: https://kode.wiki/3GZlbk4
- Complete Courses: https://kode.wiki/4dni9lM

Join us on Discord for Help(clearing doubts) while learning.
www.youtube.com/abhishekveeramalla/join

This is a Linux End to End Course designed and executed by Abhishek.Veeramalla. This course takes you through the basics of Linux, networking and shell scripting. Abhishek covers topics practically with many real time examples in this series, so make sure you don't miss it.

  - Fundamentals of Linux
  - Linux vs Windows
  - Core components of Linux
 -  Setup Linux on Windows & MacOS
 -  Linux folder structure
 -  Linux user management
 -  Linux file management
 -  VI Editor shortcuts (commonly used)
 -  File permissions
 -  Process management
 -  Linux system monitoring
 -  Basic Networking in Linux (IP, Port, CIDR, Subnet, OSI, et.c.,.)
 -  Disk and Storage management in Linux
 -  Shell Scripting

GitHub Repo for the course
https://github.com/iam-veeramalla/ultimate-linux-guide/

Udemy Course (End to End DevOps Project)
https://www.udemy.com/course/ultimate-devops-project-with-resume-preparation

Free Course on the channel
==============================
- Free DevOps Playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLdpzxOOAlwvIKMhk8WhzN1pYoJ1YU8Csa
